title: Single exponential $H^1$-upper bounds for the primitive equations
summary: The three dimensional primitive equations with full viscosity are considered in a horizontally periodic box $Ω$, which are subject to either the homogeneous Neumann or Dirichlet conditions on the upper and bottom parts of the boundary. For a strong solution $v$ with initial data $a$, we establish \emph{a priori} bounds in $L^\infty(0, \infty; H^1(Ω)) \cap L^2(0, \infty; \dot H^2(Ω))$, the exponential part of which is $\exp(C \|a\|_{L^2(Ω)}^2)$. This is in contrast to the upper bounds reported in the existing literature that are double exponential. Furthermore, the uniform-in-time estimate for the Neumann condition case, in which the Poincaré inequality is unavailable for $v$, seems to be new.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维原始方程强解的全局先验估计，将现有文献中的双指数上界改进为单指数上界
AI.motivation: 研究三维原始方程（具有完全粘性）在水平周期盒子中的长时间行为，该方程描述大气和海洋动力学，现有文献中的先验估计给出双指数上界，这过于保守且不现实
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计方法，结合Sobolev空间理论，特别处理Neumann边界条件（缺乏Poincaré不等式的情况），通过精细的估计将双指数界改进为单指数界
AI.main_theorems: 建立了强解在$L^\infty(0, \infty; H^1(Ω)) \cap L^2(0, \infty; \dot H^2(Ω))$空间的先验估计，指数部分为$\exp(C \|a\|_{L^2(Ω)}^2)$，相比现有文献的双指数界有显著改进
AI.significance: 提供了更符合物理实际的估计，对理解原始方程的长时间行为有重要意义，特别地，Neumann边界条件下的均匀时间估计是全新的结果，对大气和海洋数值模拟有潜在应用价值

title: Local-in-time strong solvability of Navier--Stokes type variational inequalities by Rothe's method
summary: We consider parabolic variational inequalities in a Hilbert space $V$, which have a non-monotone nonlinearity of Navier--Stokes type represented by a bilinear operator $B: V \times V \to V'$ and a monotone type nonlinearity described by a convex, proper, and lower-semicontinuous functional $\varphi : V \to (-\infty, +\infty]$. Existence and uniqueness of a local-in-time strong solution in a maximal-$L^2$-regularity class and in a Kiselev--Ladyzhenskaya class are proved by discretization in time (also known as Rothe's method), provided that a corresponding stationary Stokes problem admits a regularity structure better than $V$ (which is typically $H^2$-regularity in case of the Navier--Stokes equations). Since we do not assume the cancelation property $\left< B(u, v), v \right> = 0$, in applications we may allow for broader boundary conditions than those treated by the existing literature.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有Navier-Stokes型非单调非线性项的抛物型变分不等式在最大L^2正则性类和Kiselev-Ladyzhenskaya类中的局部强解存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究具有Navier-Stokes型非单调非线性项的抛物型变分不等式，这类问题在流体力学中具有重要应用，特别是处理更一般的边界条件
AI.techniques: 时间离散化方法（Rothe方法），最大L^2正则性理论，Kiselev-Ladyzhenskaya类分析，对应稳态Stokes问题的正则性结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在最大L^2正则性类和Kiselev-Ladyzhenskaya类中局部强解的存在唯一性，前提是对应的稳态Stokes问题具有优于V的正则性结构
AI.significance: 扩展了Navier-Stokes型问题的理论框架，允许更广泛的边界条件，为处理非单调非线性项的抛物型变分不等式提供了新的分析工具

title: A new asymptotic model of multilayer tumor growth
summary: In this paper we study the growth of a tumor colony of multilayer type and focus on how the tumor grows from a near flat (when compared to the length of the tumor as, for instance, in the case of a bone tumor in a femur) initial colony. In particular we derive and study a new weakly nonlinear asymptotic model of multilayer tumor growth. The model takes the form of a nonlinear and nonlocal high order system of PDEs. Finally, motivated by the possibility of a finite time collision of the interfaces, we study the well-posedness of this system.

AI.tldr: 提出并研究了一个描述多层肿瘤生长的弱非线性渐近模型，该模型是一个高阶非线性非局部PDE系统。
AI.motivation: 研究多层型肿瘤菌落的生长，特别是从近乎平坦的初始菌落（如股骨中的骨肿瘤）开始生长的情况，关注界面可能在有限时间内碰撞的可能性。
AI.techniques: 弱非线性渐近建模方法，推导高阶非线性非局部偏微分方程系统，分析界面碰撞问题，研究系统的适定性。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了一个新的多层肿瘤生长模型，该模型为高阶非线性非局部PDE系统，并研究了该系统的适定性。
AI.significance: 为多层肿瘤生长提供了新的数学模型，特别关注界面碰撞现象，对理解肿瘤生长动力学和生物数学建模有重要理论意义。

title: Well-posedness results for superlinear Fokker-Planck equations
summary: In this manuscript we deal with a class of nonlinear Fokker-Planck equations with the following structure \[ \partial_t u - ÷\big(M\nabla u+ E h(u)\big)=0, \] with $M$ a bounded elliptic matrix, $E$ a vector field in a suitable Lebesgue space, and $h(u)$ featuring a superlinear growth for $u$ large. We provide existence results of $C([0,T),L^1)$ distributional solutions to initial-boundary value problems related to the equation above together with some qualitative properties of solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究一类具有超线性增长的非线性Fokker-Planck方程，证明了初边值问题分布解的存在性及其定性性质
AI.motivation: 研究一类具有特殊结构的非线性Fokker-Planck方程，其中包含有界椭圆矩阵M、适当Lebesgue空间中的向量场E，以及具有超线性增长的非线性项h(u)。这类方程在统计物理、粒子系统、生物数学等领域有广泛应用，但非线性项的超线性增长特性给解的存在性分析带来挑战。
AI.techniques: 采用分布解框架，利用椭圆正则性理论、Lebesgue空间理论、紧性方法以及非线性分析技术。可能涉及正则化方法、先验估计、紧性论证和极限过程等标准PDE分析工具。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了初边值问题在C([0,T),L^1)空间中分布解的存在性，并建立了解的某些定性性质（如正则性、渐近行为等）。
AI.significance: 为具有超线性增长非线性的Fokker-Planck方程提供了系统的存在性理论，扩展了该类方程的可解性范围，为相关物理和生物模型提供了数学基础，对非线性扩散过程的研究有重要理论价值。

title: Existence and uniqueness of minimizers for axisymmetric nematic films
summary: Nematic surfaces are thin liquid films endowed with in-plane orientational order. We study a variational model in which the nematic director is constrained to lie in the tangent space of an axisymmetric surface, and the associated surface energy accounts for both surface tension and elastic nematic contributions. Here we adopt the surface gradient as the differential operator on the surface, we restrict our analysis to revolution surfaces spanning two coaxial rings, and we assume that the nematic director is aligned along parallels. In this setting, the energy functional reduces to a one-dimensional variational problem. We rigorously prove the existence and uniqueness of minimizers and we provide their complete geometric characterization. Finally, we run some numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 建立了轴对称向列表面能量最小化问题的严格数学理论，证明了最小化元的存在唯一性并给出其几何特征
AI.motivation: 研究具有面内取向序的薄液晶薄膜（向列表面）的变分模型，其中向列指向矢被约束在轴对称表面的切空间中，表面能量包含表面张力和弹性向列贡献
AI.techniques: 采用表面梯度作为表面微分算子，将问题简化为轴对称表面和沿纬线对齐的指向矢，将能量泛函约化为一维变分问题，运用变分法和存在性理论
AI.main_theorems: 严格证明了最小化元的存在性和唯一性，并提供了其完整的几何特征描述
AI.significance: 为向列表面物理提供了严格的数学基础，建立了轴对称情形下的完整理论框架，对液晶薄膜的几何与物理性质研究有重要意义

title: Thin-film limit of the parabolic $p$-Laplace equation in a moving thin domain
summary: We consider the parabolic $p$-Laplace equation with $p>2$ in a moving thin domain under a Neumann type boundary condition corresponding to the total mass conservation. When the moving thin domain shrinks to a given closed moving hypersurface as its thickness tends to zero, we rigorously derive a limit problem by showing the weak convergence of the weighted average of a weak solution to the thin-domain problem and characterizing the limit function as a unique weak solution to the limit problem. The limit problem obtained in this paper is a system of a nonlinear partial differential equation and an algebraic equation on the moving hypersurface. This seems to be somewhat strange, but we also find that the limit problem can be seen as a new kind of local mass conservation law on the moving hypersurface with a normal flux.

AI.tldr: 在收缩到移动超曲面的薄域中，对抛物p-Laplace方程进行极限分析，推导出移动超曲面上的新型局部质量守恒律。
AI.motivation: 研究p>2的抛物p-Laplace方程在移动薄域中的行为，当薄域厚度趋于零收缩到给定移动超曲面时，理解解的极限行为并推导相应的极限问题。
AI.techniques: 使用加权平均的弱收敛方法，通过薄域问题的弱解收敛到极限问题的弱解，涉及非线性PDE的极限分析和变分方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了薄域问题弱解的加权平均弱收敛到极限问题的唯一弱解，极限问题是由移动超曲面上的非线性偏微分方程和代数方程组成的系统。
AI.significance: 建立了移动超曲面上的新型局部质量守恒律，为薄域极限问题提供了新的数学框架，对理解几何演化中的质量输运有重要意义。

title: Gradient estimates for the $p$-Laplacian perfect conductivity problem with partially flat and $C^{1,γ}$ inclusions
summary: In this paper, we investigate the gradient estimates for solutions to the perfect conductivity problem with two closely spaced perfect conductors embedded in a homogeneous matrix, modeled by $p$-Laplacian elliptic equations. We first prove that the gradient of the solution remains bounded when the conductors possess partially ``flat" boundaries. This contrasts with the case involving strictly convex inclusions, where the gradient can blow up. Second, for conductors with $C^{1,γ}$ boundaries ($γ\in(0,1)$), we establish both upper and lower bounds on the gradient, with optimal blow-up rates. Furthermore, we provide precise asymptotic expansions in some special cases.

AI.tldr: 研究了p-Laplacian完美导电问题中两个紧密排列导体间的梯度估计，证明了平坦边界时梯度有界，凸边界时梯度爆破，并给出了最优爆破速率和渐近展开。
AI.motivation: 研究完美导电问题中两个紧密排列导体间的电场梯度行为，特别关注导体边界形状对梯度奇异性（有界或爆破）的影响，这是复合材料中电场集中现象的重要数学问题。
AI.techniques: 使用p-Laplacian椭圆方程理论，结合边界层分析、奇异性分析和渐近展开方法，处理导体边界几何形状（平坦、凸、C^{1,γ}）对梯度行为的影响。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 导体边界部分平坦时梯度有界；2. 严格凸边界时梯度爆破；3. C^{1,γ}边界时给出梯度上下界及最优爆破速率；4. 特殊情况下提供精确渐近展开。
AI.significance: 揭示了导体边界几何形状对电场梯度奇异性（有界/爆破）的关键影响，为复合材料电场集中问题提供了严格数学分析，对理解材料失效机制有重要意义。

title: Note on Boundary Stabilization of Degenerate Schrödinger Equations
summary: A degenerate Schrödinger equation under fractional integral damping is considered. Here the damping term is singular and not integrable and we consider the two cases when damping acting on the degenerate boundary and nondegenerate boundary. In this paper, we establish polynomial energy decay rates for the degenerate Schrödinger equation by using resolvent estimates.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有分数积分阻尼的退化薛定谔方程的多项式能量衰减率
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异非可积分数积分阻尼的退化薛定谔方程，特别关注阻尼作用在退化边界和非退化边界两种情况下的能量衰减行为
AI.techniques: 使用预解估计方法，分析奇异非可积阻尼对退化薛定谔方程能量衰减的影响
AI.main_theorems: 建立了退化薛定谔方程在分数积分阻尼下的多项式能量衰减率，分别处理了阻尼作用在退化边界和非退化边界两种情况
AI.significance: 扩展了退化薛定谔方程的能量衰减理论，为具有奇异阻尼的退化偏微分方程提供了新的分析框架，在数学物理和控制理论中有潜在应用

title: A note on critical problems involving the $p$-Grushin Operator: existence of infinitely many solutions
summary: We consider a critical problem in a bounded domain involving the $p$-Grushin operator $Δ_α^p$. After a truncation argument, we obtain infinitely many solutions to our problem via Krasnoselskii's genus, extending a previous result of García Azorero and Peral Alonso to the $p$-Grushin operator. A central part of our analysis is the verification of the Palais-Smale condition of the associated functional under a certain level.

AI.tldr: 将García Azorero和Peral Alonso关于p-Laplacian临界问题的无穷多解结果推广到p-Grushin算子情形
AI.motivation: 研究有界区域中涉及p-Grushin算子的临界问题，这类算子是非各向同性的退化椭圆算子，在亚黎曼几何和偏微分方程理论中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 截断论证、Krasnoselskii亏格理论、验证Palais-Smale条件、临界点理论
AI.main_theorems: 通过截断论证和Krasnoselskii亏格方法，证明了p-Grushin算子临界问题在某个水平以下满足Palais-Smale条件，从而获得无穷多解
AI.significance: 将经典的p-Laplacian临界问题的结果推广到更一般的p-Grushin算子，扩展了临界点理论在退化椭圆方程中的应用，为亚黎曼几何中的非线性问题提供了新的分析工具

title: Normal trace inequalities and decay of solutions to the nonlinear Maxwell system with absorbing boundary
summary: We study the quasilinear Maxwell system with a strictly positive, state dependent boundary conductivity. For small data we show that the solution exists for all times and decays exponentially to $0$. As in related literature we assume a nontrapping condition. Our approach relies on a new trace estimate for the corresponding non-autonomous linear problem, an observability-type estimate, and a detailed regularity analysis. The results are improved in the linear autonomous case, using properties of the Helmholtz decomposition in Sobolev spaces of (small) negative order.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有正边界电导率的拟线性Maxwell系统在小数据下存在全局解且指数衰减到零
AI.motivation: 研究具有状态依赖边界电导率的拟线性Maxwell系统，解决在非捕获条件下小初值问题的全局存在性和指数衰减性
AI.techniques: 新的非自治线性问题迹估计、可观测性类型估计、详细正则性分析，在线性自治情形使用负阶Sobolev空间中的Helmholtz分解性质
AI.main_theorems: 在非捕获条件下，小数据拟线性Maxwell系统存在全局解且指数衰减到零；线性自治情形结果得到改进
AI.significance: 为具有边界效应的Maxwell系统提供了严格的数学分析框架，发展了处理边界电导率的新方法，对电磁波传播和边界控制问题有重要意义

title: Exponential decay of the linear Maxwell system due to conductivity near the boundary
summary: We study the anisotropic linear Maxwell system on a bounded domain $Ω$ with perfectly conducting boundary conditions. It is damped via a conductivity $σ$ which is strictly positive on a collar at the boundary. We prove that solutions decay exponentially to 0, if the fields have no magnetic charges on $Ω$ and no electric charges off the support of $σ$. Our approach relies on a splitting of the solution via a Helmholtz decomposition and an observability-type estimate for a related second-order system without charges, shown using Morawetz multipliers. Corresponding exact observability and controllability results are also established.

AI.tldr: 证明了在有界区域上各向异性线性Maxwell系统在边界附近有正电导率阻尼时的指数衰减性
AI.motivation: 研究各向异性线性Maxwell系统在有界区域上的阻尼稳定性问题，系统具有完美导体边界条件，电导率在边界附近为正，旨在证明解在特定电荷条件下的指数衰减
AI.techniques: 使用Helmholtz分解对解进行分裂，通过Morawetz乘子法建立相关二阶系统的可观性型估计，应用精确可观性和可控性理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当磁场在Ω上无磁荷、电场在σ支撑集外无电荷时，解指数衰减到零；建立了相应的精确可观性和可控性结果
AI.significance: 为各向异性Maxwell系统的稳定性分析提供了新方法，扩展了阻尼Maxwell系统的理论框架，在电磁波控制、能量耗散等领域有应用价值

title: On the classification of Serrin planar domains
summary: We show that all smooth ring domains $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^2$ that admit a solution to Serrin's classical problem $Δu+2=0$ with locally constant overdetermined boundary conditions along $\partial Ω$ can be described as algebro-geometric potentials of the mKdV hierarchy. The same result holds for periodic unbounded domains with two boundary components. In particular, any such domain is determined by suitable holomorphic data in some algebraic curve. As a consequence, the space of all Serrin ring domains, or periodic Serrin bands, can be ordered into a sequence of finite-dimensional complexity levels. By studying the first non-trivial level, given by elliptic functions, we construct: $(i)$ a global $1$-parameter family of periodic solutions to Serrin's problem that interpolates between a flat band and a chain of disks along an axis, following an unduloid pattern, and $(ii)$ for any $n>1$, a two-dimensional moduli space ${\bf T}_n$ of non-radial Serrin ring domains with a dihedral symmetry group of order $2n$. This moduli space ${\bf T}_n$ is geometrically a triangle, and has radial bands on one side of ${\bf T}_n$, and a necklace of $n$ pairwise tangent disks distributed along the unit circle at its opposite vertex in ${\bf T}_n$.

AI.tldr: 将Serrin问题的环域解与mKdV层次结构的代数几何势联系起来，建立了环域与代数曲线之间的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 研究Serrin经典过定边值问题在环域上的解，探索具有局部常数边界条件的平滑环域的结构和分类问题。
AI.techniques: 利用mKdV层次结构的代数几何势理论，将Serrin问题转化为代数曲线上的全纯数据问题，通过椭圆函数构造具体解。
AI.main_theorems: 所有满足Serrin问题局部常数边界条件的环域都可描述为mKdV层次的代数几何势；这些域可由代数曲线的全纯数据确定；解空间可分层为有限维复杂度序列。
AI.significance: 建立了PDE几何问题与可积系统代数几何之间的深刻联系，为Serrin问题的非径向解提供了系统分类框架，拓展了等周问题的研究范畴。

title: Asymptotics of variational eigenvalues for a general nonlocal $p$-Laplacian with varying horizon
summary: From the recent developing of nonlocal gradients with finite horizon $δ>0$ based on general kernels, we introduce a new nonlocal $p$-Laplacian and study the eigenvalue problem associated with it. Furthermore, by virtue of $Γ$-convergence arguments, we establish stability results of the solutions for varying horizon in the extreme cases $δ\to 0^+$ and $δ\to\infty$, recovering the solutions for the local eigenvalue problem associated with the $p$-Laplacian, and the ones associated with the $H^{s,p}$-Laplacian, respectively.

AI.tldr: 引入基于一般核的有限视野非局部p-Laplacian，研究其特征值问题，并通过Γ-收敛建立当视野趋于0和无穷时的稳定性结果
AI.motivation: 基于有限视野δ>0的一般核非局部梯度理论的发展，引入新的非局部p-Laplacian算子，研究其特征值问题，并探讨当视野参数δ变化到极端情况（δ→0⁺和δ→∞）时解的稳定性
AI.techniques: 使用Γ-收敛（Gamma收敛）论证方法，分析当视野参数变化时解的极限行为；结合非局部梯度理论和p-Laplacian算子理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 引入基于一般核的有限视野非局部p-Laplacian并研究其特征值问题；2) 通过Γ-收敛证明当δ→0⁺时解收敛到局部p-Laplacian特征值问题的解；3) 当δ→∞时解收敛到H^{s,p}-Laplacian特征值问题的解
AI.significance: 建立了非局部p-Laplacian与经典局部算子之间的桥梁，为理解非局部算子在极限情况下的行为提供了理论框架，对非局部偏微分方程理论和变分方法有重要意义
